g.text: Management Reports - Filters, Functional Pipeline, Cache and Export
Set date range, branch, status, level, group/student
user_branch_access when actor is branch director
totals, groups, alerts and chart series
map visible rows and escape CSV cells
Functional interfaces are callback contracts used by
map, filter, reduce, sort and composeMetrics.
The callbacks are lambdas/arrow functions and the
metric helpers avoid shared mutable state.
